summary: The 1st Firewall for AI Agents Discussion | Link
content: HOL Guard is the firewall for AI agents. It sits between agents and your systems, blocking high-risk actions before they happen like deleting production data to exposing secrets. Built by HOL, it’s free, open source, and already has 400K+ downloads.
chineseSummary: 第一个人工智能代理防火墙讨论 |关联
chineseContent: HOL Guard 是 AI 代理的防火墙。它位于代理和您的系统之间，在高风险操作发生之前阻止它们，例如删除生产数据以暴露秘密。它由 HOL 构建，免费、开源，下载量已超过 40 万次。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
